summary: The diff modifies Header.tsx and Footer.tsx to reference new logo assets with the `.dim_600x700.png` and `.dim_300x120.png` suffixes. The Footer uses `loboda-logo.dim_600x700.png` and the Header uses both `loboda-logo.dim_600x700.png` (desktop) and `loboda-logo-icon.dim_300x120.png` (mobile). However, the requirements specify the assets must be stored at `loboda-logo.png` and `loboda-logo-icon.png` respectively. No new image files are added in the diff. The compact logo is used in the mobile header context, which satisfies the usage AC for REQ-7.

missing_requirements.requirement: Replace the existing logo asset at frontend/public/assets/generated/loboda-logo.png
missing_requirements.reason: No image file was added or replaced at frontend/public/assets/generated/loboda-logo.png. The diff shows no added files, and the components reference loboda-logo.dim_600x700.png instead of loboda-logo.png as specified in the requirements.

missing_requirements.requirement: Store a compact logo asset at frontend/public/assets/generated/loboda-logo-icon.png
missing_requirements.reason: No image file was added at frontend/public/assets/generated/loboda-logo-icon.png. The diff shows no added files, and the Header references loboda-logo-icon.dim_300x120.png instead of loboda-logo-icon.png as specified in the requirements.

hallucinated_features.description: Logo assets are referenced with dimension suffixes (.dim_600x700.png and .dim_300x120.png) rather than the canonical filenames specified in the requirements (loboda-logo.png and loboda-logo-icon.png)
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request specifies asset paths as loboda-logo.png and loboda-logo-icon.png, but the implementation uses loboda-logo.dim_600x700.png and loboda-logo-icon.dim_300x120.png, a naming convention not requested.
